blocks.content: According to the 2025 report of the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP), Nepal's Human Development Index (HDI) is 0.622, ranking Nepal 145th among 193 countries. Last year, Nepal was at the 146th position, showing a slight improvement this year. In 1990, this index was 0.398. During that period, the average life expectancy of Nepalis was 70.4 years. Similarly, according to the second periodic plan of Lumbini Province for 80/81, the HDI for the province is 0.563, and the average life expectancy is 69.5 years. Detailed poverty indicators are included in the table below.
